PreToolUse.pattern: rm -rf|git reset --hard|git push --force|git checkout \.|git clean -f|drop table|truncate
PreToolUse.message: Destructive operation blocked by Forge safety hook. Use /careful mode or confirm explicitly.
Skipping hooks/signing is blocked. Fix the underlying issue instead.

PreToolUse.description: Detect hardcoded secrets before they enter code
PreToolUse.message: Potential secret detected in code. Use environment variables instead.

PreToolUse.description: Block writes to config protection files without confirmation
PreToolUse.message: Modifying project config file. Verify this is intentional.
File exceeds 300-line limit. Consider splitting into smaller modules.

PostToolUse.message: File modified — checkpoint available for rollback

PostToolUse.description: Remind sync check after code changes
Check for zero-debt violations after write
PostToolUse.message: Technical debt marker found. Implement now or create a GitHub Issue — no TODOs in committed code.

SessionStart.description: Load playbook and rules at session start

Stop.message: Session ending — consider running /learn to save any new insights to the playbook.

PreCompact.message: Context compacting — verify important context (current task, spec section, test status) is preserved.
